name: bangumi
description: A full-featured Bangumi client for Raycast. Manage collections, track progress, search subjects and characters, view daily schedules. Includes AI tools for Raycast AI.
author: maxchang3

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: list-collections
commands.title: List Collections
commands.description: View and update your watching, playing, or reading subjects.

commands.name: list-current-collections
commands.title: List Current Collections
commands.description: View your current watching, playing, or reading subjects.

commands.name: daily-calendar
commands.title: Daily Calendar
commands.description: View the daily airing schedule of anime.

commands.name: search-subjects
commands.title: Search Subjects
commands.description: Search for anime, games, books, etc. on Bangumi.

tools.name: get-collections
tools.title: Get Collections
tools.description: Get the user's current collections (watching, playing, reading, etc) on Bangumi.

tools.name: update-collection
tools.title: Update Collection Status
tools.description: Update the collection status for a given subject on Bangumi.

tools.name: search-subjects
tools.title: Search Subjects
tools.description: Search for subjects (anime, games, books, etc.) by keyword on Bangumi.

tools.name: search-characters
tools.title: Search Characters
tools.description: Search for characters by keyword on Bangumi.

tools.name: get-calendar
tools.title: Get Daily Calendar
tools.description: Get the daily airing schedule of anime on Bangumi.

tools.name: get-subject-details
tools.title: Get Subject Details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific subject on Bangumi.

tools.name: get-subject-episodes
tools.title: Get Subject Episodes
tools.description: Get the episode list and user collection status for a subject's episodes on Bangumi.

tools.name: update-episodes
tools.title: Update Episodes Status
tools.description: Update the collection status (e.g., mark as watched) for specific episodes of a subject on Bangumi.

preferences.name: showBook
preferences.description: Show book subjects in the collection list
preferences.label: Show Books

preferences.name: showAnime
preferences.description: Show anime subjects in the collection list
preferences.label: Show Anime

preferences.name: showMusic
preferences.description: Show music subjects in the collection list
preferences.label: Show Music

preferences.name: showGame
preferences.description: Show game subjects in the collection list
preferences.label: Show Games

preferences.name: showReal
preferences.description: Show real-life subjects in the collection list
preferences.label: Show Real Life

title: Bangumi
